page_title: Kathmandu, Pokhara & the Himalayan Foothills | Alpen Glow Tours and Travels
title: Kathmandu, Pokhara & the Himalayan Foothills
overview_paragraphs: Nepal compresses the Himalaya's scale into a trip that doesn't require technical trekking experience — Kathmandu's temple-dense old town, Pokhara's lakeside calm with the Annapurna range as backdrop, and an early-morning mountain flight that gets you eye-level with Everest without the multi-week trek.
Suited to travelers who want genuine Himalayan scenery and culture on a comfortable, non-trekking itinerary.
